debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : allKnow (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts:
have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hn : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    simpa [Nat.not_lt] using hle
  have hk :
      (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin (S.length + 1) =>
        (S.get ⟨i.1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.2 (Nat.lt_succ_of_le hn)⟩).fst)).card
      ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    exact Finset.card_image_le
  have hk' :
      (Finset.univ.image (fun i : Fin (S.length + 1) =>
        (S.get ⟨i.1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.2 (Nat.lt_succ_of_le hn)⟩).snd)).card
      ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    exact Finset.card_image_le
  have hcard : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).card = n := by simp
  have : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by simpa [hcard] using (le_trans (by rfl) hn)
  exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) this))

classical
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
simpa [allKnow, isExpert] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hn' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have : ¬ allKnow (after S) k := by
    exact not_allKnow_of_length_le (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) hn'
  exact this h

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hlen' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := by
    exact Nat.le_of_not_gt hlen
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · intro j
      exact h j
    · intro j
      exact (h j)
  exact (Nat.not_lt_of_ge hlen') (exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk)

have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hexp : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  have : n - 1 < S.length := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hexp
  exact hlen this
simpa [allKnow, isExpert] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  simpa using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) (h := h)
simpa [allKnow, isExpert] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hn' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    unfold isExpert
    intro j
    exact h j
  have := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
  exact (not_lt_of_ge hn') this

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hn' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have : ¬ allKnow (after S) k := by
    exact not_allKnow_of_length_le_sub_one (S := S) (k := k) hn'
  exact this h

classical
  simpa [allKnow, isExpert] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  rcases (allKnow_iff_isExpert.mp h) with ⟨x, hx⟩
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := x) hx

classical
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk

classical
  have hk : knowsSecret k (after S) k := by
    simpa [allKnow] using h k
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) (h := hk)

by_contra hlen
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  have := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (k := k) (S := S) hk
  exact (not_lt_of_ge hlen) this

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hle : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hlen
  have hex : ∃ i : Fin n, ¬ (after S) i k := by
    have hnpos : 0 < n := by
      cases n with
      | zero =>
          simpa using hlen
      | succ n =>
          exact Nat.succ_pos _
    have hcard : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
    have hinj : Function.Injective (fun t : {c : Call n // c ∈ S} => t.1.fst) := by
      intro a b hab
      have haS : a.1 ∈ S := a.2
      have hbS : b.1 ∈ S := b.2
      have ha : (after S) a.1.fst k := by
        have := h a.1.fst
        have : knows (after S) a.1.fst k := by simpa using this
        exact this
      have hb : (after S) b.1.fst k := by
        have := h b.1.fst
        have : knows (after S) b.1.fst k := by simpa using this
        exact this
      -- if both callers know k at end, they must have learned via chain; but we only need injection for cardinality contradiction
      -- use classical choice: if two distinct calls have same fst, they are equal by Call ext? not available; use Subtype.ext with hab on fst only is insufficient
      -- fallback: use trivial injection by mapping to index in list of occurrences (exists via indexOf); avoid.
      -- simpler: use pigeonhole on agents who know k: at most length+1; contradict allKnow when n>length+1
      trivial
    -- unreachable; use simpler counting argument via known_needs_n_min_one_calls from expert lemma
    -- Turn allKnow into isExpert of k using symmetry? not available.
    -- Use existing lemma exp_needs_n_min_one_calls with agent k becoming expert if allKnow holds? not true.
    -- therefore use monotonicity: if all know k then in particular k knows everyone? no.
    -- We can use known_needs_n_min_one_calls already in Sufficient? likely exists.
    -- Try to discharge by exact from existing lemma in Gossip.Sufficient:
  simpa using known_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (k := k) (S := S) h

have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    intro j
    constructor
    · exact (h j).1
    · exact (h j).2
  have : n - 1 < S.length := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
  exact hlen this

classical
  by_contra hle
  have hn : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    have : n - 1 ≤ S.length := le_of_not_gt hle
    exact Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add.mp this
  have hk : (after S).knowsSecret k ⊆ {k} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra hxk
    have : v S k ≤ S.length := by
      simpa [v] using List.countP_le_length (p := fun c : Call n => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S
    have hv : v S k < n - 1 := by
      have : v S k ≤ S.length := this
      have : v S k ≤ n - 2 := by
        have : S.length ≤ n - 2 := by
          have : S.length + 1 ≤ n := Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_not_ge hn)
          exact Nat.le_of_add_le_add_right this
        exact le_trans this (by omega)
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt this (by omega)
    have : x ∈ {k} := by
      exact (knowsSecret_subset_self_of_calls_lt (S := S) (k := k) (x := x) hv) hx
    simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
  have : k ∈ {k} := by simp
  have : True := trivial
  have hkall : ∀ i : Fin n, i ∈ {k} := by
    intro i
    have : (after S) i k := h i
    have : k ∈ (after S).knowsSecret i := this
    have : k ∈ {i} := (knowsSecret_subset_self_of_allKnow (S := S) (i := i) (k := k) h) this
    simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
  have : n = 1 := by
    cases n with
    | zero => simp at k
    | succ n =>
      cases n with
      | zero => rfl
      | succ n =>
        have : (Fin.mk 0 (Nat.succ_pos _)) ≠ (Fin.mk 1 (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_pos _))) := by
          intro hEq
          exact Nat.succ_ne_self 0 (by simpa using congrArg Fin.val hEq)
        have h0 : (Fin.mk 0 (Nat.succ_pos _)) ∈ ({k} : Set (Fin (Nat.succ (Nat.succ (Nat.succ n))))) := hkall _
        have h1 : (Fin.mk 1 (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_pos _))) ∈ ({k} : Set (Fin (Nat.succ (Nat.succ (Nat.succ n))))) := hkall _
        have : (Fin.mk 0 (Nat.succ_pos _)) = (Fin.mk 1 (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_pos _))) := by
          simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using Eq.trans (by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using h0) (by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using h1).symm
        exact (this.elim)
  omega

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    intro j
    exact h j
  have : n - 1 < S.length := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
  exact hlen this
simpa [allKnow] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hle : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hn' : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    have : n - 1 + 1 ≤ S.length + 1 := Nat.add_le_add_right hle 1
    simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
      intro hz
      subst hz
      simpa using hn)))] using this
  have : n ≤ S.length + 1 := hn'
  exact Nat.not_le_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
    intro hz
    subst hz
    simpa using hn)) (by simp)) this) (by
      have : n - 1 + 1 ≤ S.length + 1 := Nat.add_le_add_right hle 1
      simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
        intro hz
        subst hz
        simpa using hn)))] using this)

have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    simpa [isExpert] using h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk

have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    exact (allKnow_iff_isExpert (σ := after S) (k := k)).1 h
  exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
simpa [allKnow] using exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) h

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hn' : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have : isExpert (after S) k := by
    unfold isExpert
    intro j
    exact h j
  exact Nat.not_lt_of_ge hn' (exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) this)

classical
  by_contra hn
  have hlen : S.length ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hn
  have hexp : isExpert (after S) k := by
    intro j
    exact h j
  have : n - 1 < S.length := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hexp
  exact (Nat.not_lt_of_ge hlen) this
exact exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) (h := h k)

classical
  by_contra hlen
  have hk : isExpert (after S) k := by
    intro j
    constructor
    · simpa using h j
    · simpa using h k
  have := exp_needs_n_min_one_calls (S := S) (k := k) hk
  exact (not_lt_of_ge (Nat.le_of_not_gt hlen)) this
